__comment__: EXAMPLE CONFIG (jewelry niche). REPLACE with the competitor domains in YOUR cohort. Maps a registrable domain -> list of brand-name display variants used for brand-density scoring in analyze_structure.py. Use SPECIFIC forms only (spaced + concatenated), never generic words like 'jewelry' or 'gold' that would inflate the count. If a fetched domain is missing here, the brand token is auto-derived from the domain (e.g. 'oceanwavejewelry.com' -> 'oceanwave').
